name: wa
description: Backend WhatsApp Web (Puppeteer / whatsapp-web.js) + auth via UWABA

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'); const p=path.join(process.cwd(),'node_modules'); if(fs.existsSync(p)){ try { fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,maxRetries:3}); console.log('node_modules dihapus'); } catch(e){ console.error('Tutup semua proses Node/Chrome lalu coba lagi. Error:', e.message); process.exit(1); } }"
